chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-227 of 2021 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For order on MA. 7657/2024. 2. For order on MA. 7658/2024. 3. For hearing of CMA 1490/2021, 4. For hearing of main case. 30.08.2024. Mian Mushtaque Ahmed, advocate for petitioner = 1. Granted. 2 to 4. Learned counsel submits that since execution application application has been allowed and impugned order has been implemented, the petitioner has vacated the demised premises, he does not press this petition and has filed application to this effect. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the petition is dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE A.K
